creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As Campus Insecurity wrote:

> >Description:
> The FILES section of the termcap man page lists 
> "/usr/share/misc/termcap".  The correct path is "/etc/termcap".

You are wrong.  /usr/share/misc/termcap _is_ the place where it lives.
/etc/termcap is only a symlink maintained for legacy programs.

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
